note: LIVE hot-patch list — the default subscription for the AI Blocker extension. Edit this file to fix or add rules; every install picks up changes within ~24h (or immediately via the popup's 'Update now'). Rules here are ADDED on top of the built-in rules, so adding a corrected selector heals a rotted built-in one with no extension release. Format: see filters/remote-example.json. Lists are data, never code.
